d:
Mehira marks a target area with her kiss, striking all enemies within [[2]] tiles [[6]] times, with each strike dealing [[50%]]<ATK> damage. After a short delay, she unleashes a powerful blast in the same area, dealing [[170%]]<ATK> damage.
Enemies hit by the powerful blast become [[charmed]] for [[3]]s.
Increases the powerful blast damage to [[190%]]<ATK>.
Increases the powerful blast damage to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the powerful blast damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the powerful blast damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.

Mehira lashes her whip at all units, friend or foe, in a [[3]]-tile frontal arc [[5]] times. Each hit causes a unit to lose [[20%]]<ATK> HP. If an allied unit is hit, they gain [[25]] Haste for [[8]]s, and their HP loss from this skill is reduced by [[90%]]. Mehira always targets the direction that hits the most enemies.
Increases the HP loss caused by each whip hit to [[24%]]<ATK>.
Increases the HP loss caused by each whip hit to [[28%]]<ATK>.
Increases the HP loss caused by each whip hit to [[32%]]<ATK>.

Mehira summons an illusion of herself on the tile closest to the enemy lineup, bewitching all enemies and making them rush mindlessly toward the illusion for [[2.2]]s. When a battle starts, she summons such an illusion on a [[symmetrical]] tile across from where she stands.
Increases the duration of the bewitched state to [[2.3]]s.
Increases the duration of the bewitched state to [[2.4]]s.
Increases the duration of the bewitched state to [[2.5]]s.
Increases Life Drain by [[8]]. Each time the total healing Mehira receives from any sources reaches [[40%]] of her initial max HP, her ATK increases by [[6%]], up to [[18%]].
Increases Life Drain by [[10]]. Each time the total healing Mehira receives from any sources reaches [[40%]] of her initial max HP, her ATK increases by [[8%]], up to [[24%]].
Increases Life Drain by [[12]]. Each time the total healing Mehira receives from any sources reaches [[40%]] of her initial max HP, her ATK increases by [[10%]], up to [[30%]].

When a battle starts, Mehira summons [[3]] voidlings around her. Each voidling attacks an enemy every [[1.5]]s, dealing [[40%]]<ATK> damage. If Mehira takes a hit that would reduce her HP below [[20%]], she sacrifices a voidling to block that damage. She then becomes untargetable for [[2.5]]s and instantly recovers [[20%]] of her max HP.
Increases the damage dealt by each voidling attack to [[50%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by each voidling attack to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Mehira stores any excess healing she receives. Each time the stored amount reaches [[50%]] of her initial max HP, she summons one extra voidling, up to [[3]] per battle.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 10 Haste.

d: Increases the damage taken by enemies [[charmed]] with Mehira's Euphoric Rush or bewitched with her Alluring Mirage by [[15%]]. This effect does not stack.
